attached_docs: KFM Markdown Modernization & GitHub Documentation Implementation Agent v4.0.0
Kansas Frontier Matrix — AI Build Operating Contract.md

validation_gates.reason: Repository identity, push permission, default branch, current base, target blob, Directory Rules, runtime child lanes, workflows, generated-receipt lane, and receipt schema were inspected.
The complete v0.3 target was read and its prior blob was pinned before authoring.

The review branch was created from main@b960e0988a0365a35ab4eb405ff8d19a56a5f196; runtime/README.md remained blob 894d15bb2e2d0185f433e35c690e0a6b42327fb9 before mutation; no overlapping open pull request was found.

The canonical runtime root README was updated in place. This receipt uses the existing data/receipts/generated/ process-memory lane. No root or authority path was created, moved, renamed, or promoted.
The README was reconciled against current local, mock, Flora, and log lane documentation, Directory Rules, and bounded workflow definitions.
The twelve required root README sections remain in the exact Directory Rules §15 order.
UTF-8, LF endings, final newline, one H1, required headings, Markdown parsing, balanced language-tagged fences, balanced HTML, tables, and alert structure were checked.
Internal fragments resolve, the custom top anchor is unique, and the compact navigation retains the intended destinations.
Seven static Shields badges are descriptive and linked to evidence-bearing destinations. No dynamic workflow or release badge was added.
The badges carry static document posture only; live endpoint reachability was not required or claimed.
Document identity, purpose, authority boundaries, required sections, runtime object vocabulary, conflicts, unknowns, validation guidance, review burden, and rollback posture were preserved.
No credential-like secret, private endpoint, restricted payload, protected coordinate, living-person record, genomic material, or hidden reasoning was introduced.
GitHub returned blob 520097cf14639e41191a399c84f080c2c6cfb30f, matching the locally computed Git blob for the validated 59,347-byte README.

Required fields, artifact/hash closure, truth labels, validation outcomes, citations, model metadata, timestamp, and pending human-review state were checked against the inspected generated-receipt schema.
Documentation/provenance-only change; no runtime, schema, contract, policy, fixture, validator, workflow, package, release, deployment, or public behavior changed.
Repository checks run after draft pull-request creation and were unavailable at receipt emission time.

notes: AI-authored documentation-only modernization on a scoped review branch. runtime/README.md is upgraded in place to v0.4 and remains subordinate to evidence, policy, release, correction, rollback, and public-client governance. The generated receipt records process provenance only; it is not runtime evidence, human approval, release authority, or KFM publication. Human review remains pending.
